question: A bakery sells cupcakes for 3 dollars each. If Maria buys 8 cupcakes and pays with a 50 dollar bill, how much change does she receive?
A train travels at 80 kilometers per hour. How far will it travel in 2 hours and 45 minutes?
A rectangular garden is 12 meters long and 7 meters wide. What is the area of the garden in square meters?
Sarah has 156 stickers. She wants to divide them equally among 12 friends. How many stickers does each friend get?
A store offers a 25 percent discount on a jacket originally priced at 120 dollars. What is the sale price?
If a car uses 7 liters of fuel per 100 kilometers, how many liters are needed for a 350 kilometer trip?
A swimming pool is being filled at a rate of 15 liters per minute. How many hours will it take to fill a 5400 liter pool?
Tom scored 85, 92, 78, 96, and 89 on five math tests. What is his average score?
A factory produces 450 widgets per hour. If the factory operates for 8 hours a day, 5 days a week, how many widgets are produced in one week?
A recipe calls for 2.5 cups of flour to make 24 cookies. How many cups of flour are needed to make 60 cookies?
A phone plan costs 45 dollars per month plus 0.10 dollars per text message. If Jamie sends 230 text messages in a month, what is the total bill?
A cylindrical water tank has a radius of 3 meters and a height of 5 meters. What is its volume in cubic meters? Use pi equals 3.14159.
An investor puts 5000 dollars into an account with 4 percent annual simple interest. How much total money will be in the account after 3 years?
A bookshelf has 6 shelves, and each shelf can hold 14 books. If 53 books are already placed on the shelves, how many more books can fit?
A movie theater has 15 rows with 22 seats each and 8 rows with 18 seats each. What is the total seating capacity?
A painter charges 25 dollars per hour for the first 8 hours and 37.50 dollars per hour for overtime. If the job takes 11 hours, what is the total cost?
A triangle has a base of 10 centimeters and a height of 6 centimeters. What is its area in square centimeters?
Three friends split a restaurant bill of 87.60 dollars equally, and each leaves a 20 percent tip on their share. How much does each person pay in total?
A laptop originally costs 1200 dollars. It is first discounted by 15 percent, and then an additional 10 percent is taken off the discounted price. What is the final price?
A water tank loses 2.5 liters per hour due to a leak. If the tank starts with 200 liters, how many liters remain after 3 days?
A parking garage charges 5 dollars for the first hour and 2.50 dollars for each additional half hour. How much does it cost to park for 4 hours?
If 8 workers can build a wall in 6 days, how many days would it take 12 workers to build the same wall?
A school bus makes 4 trips per day, carrying 36 students each trip. How many student-trips does the bus complete in a 5-day school week?
A rope is 15 meters long. It is cut into pieces, each 0.75 meters long. How many pieces are there?
A shop sells apples at 1.20 dollars per kilogram and oranges at 1.80 dollars per kilogram. If a customer buys 3 kilograms of apples and 2 kilograms of oranges, what is the total cost?
